institution.name: SUNY College of Technology at Alfred

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at SUNY College of Technology at Alfred rose 14% between 2006 and 2009 ($5.4k → $6.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at SUNY College of Technology at Alfred fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at SUNY College of Technology at Alfred are 22% above the public associate's-predominant peer median ($50.4k vs $41.2k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at SUNY College of Technology at Alfred rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 (32.9% → 38.3%).
